decision.reason: The candidate parsed generated HWPX and public rhwp HWP/HWPX samples, but it still needs a browser/Tauri bundling check before direct runtime adoption.
decision.next_gate: Adopt only through a fail-closed adapter or a non-React runtime path; keep browser-side HWPX preview/XML extraction as the lightweight built-in path.
